description: Solar & battery investment ROI tracking — payback progress, cumulative savings, projected dates

panels.title: Solar Cost
panels.description: Total solar system investment (7.4kW panels + 6kW Fronius, Dec 2022)

panels.title: Solar Savings (Data)
panels.description: Total solar savings from available IoTaWatt data (since Jan 2024)

panels.title: Solar Savings (Est. Total)
panels.description: Estimated total solar savings since install (Dec 2022), extrapolated using daily average from data period

panels.title: Solar Daily Avg
panels.description: Average daily solar savings (self-consumption value + export credits)

panels.title: Solar Payback
panels.description: Percentage of $6,400 solar investment recovered through savings

panels.title: Solar Payback Date
panels.description: Estimated date when cumulative solar savings exceed system cost

panels.title: Cumulative Solar Savings
panels.description: Running total of monthly solar savings (self-consumption + export credits)

panels.title: Cumulative Savings Over Time
panels.description: Monthly cumulative solar savings from IoTaWatt data. Battery savings will overlay once sigenergy2mqtt is active.

panels.title: Battery Savings
panels.description: Total battery savings since install (discharge value − charge cost at TOU rates)

targets.query:
import "date"
import "timezone"
import "dict"
import "math"
import "array"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Australia/Sydney")

peak_tariff = $${peak_tariff}
offpeak_tariff = $${offpeak_tariff}
evoffpeak_tariff = $${evoffpeak_tariff}
superoffpeak_tariff = $${superoffpeak_tariff}
feedin_tariff = $${feedin_tariff}

tariffs = dict.fromList(pairs: [
    {key: "peak", value: peak_tariff},
    {key: "offpeak", value: offpeak_tariff},
    {key: "evoffpeak", value: evoffpeak_tariff},
    {key: "superoffpeak", value: superoffpeak_tariff}
])

getPrice = (timeVal) => {
    hour = date.hour(t: timeVal)
    month = date.month(t: timeVal)
    isPeakSeason = month >= 11 or month <= 3 or (month >= 6 and month <= 8)
    isEVTime = hour >= 0 and hour < 6
    isSuperOffPeak = hour >= 11 and hour < 14
    isPeakTime = hour >= 15 and hour < 21
    return if isEVTime then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "evoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isSuperOffPeak then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "superoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isPeakTime and isPeakSeason then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "peak", default: 0.0)
    else dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "offpeak", default: 0.0)
}

discharge = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z"))
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id =~ /battery_discharging_power$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: (r._value / 1000.0) * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)}))
    |> sum()
    |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_value")

charge = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z"))
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id =~ /battery_charging_power$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: (r._value / 1000.0) * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)}))
    |> sum()
    |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_value")

netSavings = discharge[0] - charge[0]
daysActive = float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z"))) / float(v: uint(v: 1d))
dailyAvg = netSavings / daysActive

array.from(rows: [{_value: netSavings}])

panels.title: Battery Daily Avg
panels.description: Average daily battery savings (grid import avoided at TOU rates)

    |> range(start: time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z"))
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id =~ /battery_charging_power$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")

targets.query:
import "date"
import "timezone"
import "dict"
import "math"
import "array"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Australia/Sydney")

peak_tariff = $${peak_tariff}
offpeak_tariff = $${offpeak_tariff}
evoffpeak_tariff = $${evoffpeak_tariff}
superoffpeak_tariff = $${superoffpeak_tariff}
feedin_tariff = $${feedin_tariff}

tariffs = dict.fromList(pairs: [
    {key: "peak", value: peak_tariff},
    {key: "offpeak", value: offpeak_tariff},
    {key: "evoffpeak", value: evoffpeak_tariff},
    {key: "superoffpeak", value: superoffpeak_tariff}
])

getPrice = (timeVal) => {
    hour = date.hour(t: timeVal)
    month = date.month(t: timeVal)
    isPeakSeason = month >= 11 or month <= 3 or (month >= 6 and month <= 8)
    isEVTime = hour >= 0 and hour < 6
    isSuperOffPeak = hour >= 11 and hour < 14
    isPeakTime = hour >= 15 and hour < 21
    return if isEVTime then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "evoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isSuperOffPeak then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "superoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isPeakTime and isPeakSeason then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "peak", default: 0.0)
    else dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "offpeak", default: 0.0)
}

discharge = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z"))
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id =~ /battery_discharging_power$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: (r._value / 1000.0) * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)}))
    |> sum()
    |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_value")

charge = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z"))
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id =~ /battery_charging_power$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: (r._value / 1000.0) * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)}))
    |> sum()
    |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_value")

netSavings = discharge[0] - charge[0]
daysActive = float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z"))) / float(v: uint(v: 1d))
dailyAvg = netSavings / daysActive

daysToPayback = float(v: $${battery_cost}) / dailyAvg
installDate = time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z")
paybackEpoch = uint(v: installDate) + uint(v: duration(v: string(v: int(v: math.round(x: daysToPayback))) + "d"))
array.from(rows: [{_time: time(v: paybackEpoch), _value: daysToPayback}])

panels.title: Combined Payback
panels.description: Percentage of total $18,400 investment recovered. Solar savings extrapolated from install date, battery savings from actual data.

targets.query:
import "date"
import "timezone"
import "dict"
import "math"
import "array"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Australia/Sydney")

peak_tariff = $${peak_tariff}
offpeak_tariff = $${offpeak_tariff}
evoffpeak_tariff = $${evoffpeak_tariff}
superoffpeak_tariff = $${superoffpeak_tariff}
feedin_tariff = $${feedin_tariff}

tariffs = dict.fromList(pairs: [
    {key: "peak", value: peak_tariff},
    {key: "offpeak", value: offpeak_tariff},
    {key: "evoffpeak", value: evoffpeak_tariff},
    {key: "superoffpeak", value: superoffpeak_tariff}
])

getPrice = (timeVal) => {
    hour = date.hour(t: timeVal)
    month = date.month(t: timeVal)
    isPeakSeason = month >= 11 or month <= 3 or (month >= 6 and month <= 8)
    isEVTime = hour >= 0 and hour < 6
    isSuperOffPeak = hour >= 11 and hour < 14
    isPeakTime = hour >= 15 and hour < 21
    return if isEVTime then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "evoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isSuperOffPeak then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "superoffpeak", default: 0.0)
    else if isPeakTime and isPeakSeason then dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "peak", default: 0.0)
    else dict.get(dict: tariffs, key: "offpeak", default: 0.0)
}

discharge = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z"))
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id =~ /battery_discharging_power$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: (r._value / 1000.0) * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)}))
    |> sum()
    |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_value")

charge = from(bucket: "$${sigenergy_bucket}")
    |> range(start: time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z"))
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id =~ /battery_charging_power$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: (r._value / 1000.0) * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)}))
    |> sum()
    |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_value")

netSavings = discharge[0] - charge[0]
daysActive = float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: time(v: "$${battery_install_date}T00:00:00Z"))) / float(v: uint(v: 1d))
dailyAvg = netSavings / daysActive

// Also get solar total savings (extrapolated)
solarGen = from(bucket: "iotawatt")
    |> range(start: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "SolarGeneration" and r.unit == "Wh")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * $${cal_solar}}))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")

solarExp = from(bucket: "iotawatt")
    |> range(start: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "SolarExport" and r.unit == "Wh")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * $${cal_export}}))
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")

solarSavings = join(tables: {gen: solarGen, exp: solarExp}, on: ["_time"])
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _value: ((r._value_gen - r._value_exp) / 1000.0) * getPrice(timeVal: r._time)
                + (r._value_exp / 1000.0) * feedin_tariff
    }))
    |> sum()
    |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_value")

solarFirstTime = from(bucket: "iotawatt")
    |> range(start: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "SolarGeneration" and r.unit == "Wh")
    |> first()
    |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_time")

solarDataDays = float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: solarFirstTime[0])) / float(v: uint(v: 1d))
solarInstallDate = time(v: "$${solar_install_date}T00:00:00Z")
solarTotalDays = float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: solarInstallDate)) / float(v: uint(v: 1d))
solarEstTotal = (solarSavings[0] / solarDataDays) * solarTotalDays

totalSavings = solarEstTotal + netSavings
totalCost = float(v: $${solar_cost}) + float(v: $${battery_cost})

array.from(rows: [{_value: totalSavings / totalCost * 100.0}])

panels.title: Annual Savings Rate
panels.description: Projected annual solar savings based on daily average (battery savings will be added once active)

list.name: solar_cost
list.label: Solar System Cost ($)
list.description: Total cost of solar panel installation

list.name: data_start_date
list.label: IoTaWatt Data Start
list.description: Earliest date with IoTaWatt solar data (YYYY-MM-DD)

title: Home Energy ROI
